name: groq_lpu_576
_comment: Groq LPU: SRAM-only inference accelerator. 230 MB on-die SRAM @ 80 TB/s per chip; 188 TFLOPS FP16 (750 TOPS INT8). 576-chip topology referenced for Llama-2-70B INT8 inference (sram.md §3.4). Uses the explicit `tiers` block (path 2) rather than sram_*+hbm_* (path 1) because there is no DRAM tier — only SRAM. The hbm_* fields are filled with the SRAM values to satisfy the back-compat-required loader fields, but get_tiers() returns only the explicit `tiers` list. See [GROQ-LPU, GROQ-DEEPDIVE].
